title: Midnight Helm Values
description: Supernode-opinionated Midnight node chart values. Secrets are sourced only through VaultStaticSecret; chart-managed Kubernetes Secrets are internal delivery mechanisms created by the Vault Secrets Operator.

nameOverride.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Overrides the Kubernetes app name used by the chart.

fullnameOverride.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Overrides the full Kubernetes resource name. Leave empty so the release name controls resource names.

displayName.description: Optional. Human-readable workload name shown by Supernode tooling. MCP normally sets this from releaseName.

image.description: Optional. Midnight node image repository and tag. Current docs list 0.22.5 for Preview, 0.22.2 for Preprod, and 0.22.1 for Mainnet.

repository.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Container image repository for midnight-node.

tag.description: Optional. Midnight node image tag to deploy.

resources.description: Optional. Kubernetes CPU and memory requests and limits for the Midnight node container.

service.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Fixed ClusterIP Service port numbers for RPC, P2P, and metrics.

persistence.description: Required. Persistent storage for Midnight chain data. At minimum set persistence.storageClass for normal Supernode installs.

storageClass.description: Required. Kubernetes StorageClass used for the Midnight chain-data PVC.

accessModes.description: Advanced, usually not modified. PVC access modes.

annotations.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Annotations added to the generated PVC.

size.description: Optional. Requested PVC size for Midnight chain data.

existingClaim.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Existing PVC name to mount instead of creating a StatefulSet volumeClaimTemplate.

node.description: Required. Midnight node runtime settings. Normal installs set node.network and use the default bootnodes for Preview or documented bootnodes for Preprod.

replicas.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Number of Midnight node pods. Keep 1 for this StatefulSet.

network.description: Required. Midnight environment represented by this workload. Choose the environment that matches image.tag and the external Cardano DB Sync instance.

cfgPreset.description: Advanced, usually not modified. CFG_PRESET passed to the Midnight Docker entrypoint. Current public Docker docs still use testnet-02 for node configuration.

bootnodes.description: Optional. Bootnode multiaddresses. Defaults target Midnight Preview. Use documented Preprod bootnodes for Preprod.

pruning.description: Optional. Set to archive for archive nodes, otherwise leave empty for full/RPC nodes.

extraArgs.description: Advanced. Additional raw Midnight node CLI arguments appended to the opinionated defaults.

dbSync.description: Required. Vault source for the Cardano DB Sync PostgreSQL connection string. The Vault record must contain a `connection` key.

nodeKey.description: Required. Vault source for the Midnight node private key. The Vault record must contain a `node.key` key unless the chart helper is changed.

nodeSelector.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Kubernetes nodeSelector for scheduling.

tolerations.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Kubernetes tolerations.

affinity.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Kubernetes affinity rules.

vaultAuth.description: Optional. VaultAuth reference used by chart-managed VaultStaticSecret resources.

path.description: Required. Runtime Vault path without kv/data prefix.
